meta_description: Multi-material injection molding is a process in which two or more different materials are bonded to form a single plastic part.

sections.heading: What You Need To Know About Material Compatibility For Multi-Material Injection Molding
sections.text: What You Need To Know About Material Compatibility For Multi-Material Injection Molding Published on November 24, 2021 Originally published on fastradius.com on November 24, 2021 Multi-material injection molding is an umbrella term referring to any injection molding process in which two or more different materials are bonded to form a single plastic part. The most common types of multi-material injection molding are overmolding and two-shot injection molding. Overmolding is a process that forms a unified product from two or more different thermoplastics . During this process, an engineer molds a substrate out of the rigid overmold material and then places the substrate in an overmold cavity...
